title: Ports
drDigitalIntro:
Ports are the small slots along the sides of your laptop.
• You plug cords and accessories into them.
• Examples: your charger, a mouse, or a flash drive.
drDigitalSuccess: Those are your ports! You now know every major part of the laptop.
drDigitalHint: Take a look along the sides of your laptop, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
